message:
feat(cli): add 'sbh log' command and cross-user daemon detection fallback

Add new 'sbh log' subcommand for viewing JSONL activity log entries:
- --tail/-n N: show last N entries (default 50)
- --follow/-f: tail -f style live following with 250ms poll
- --type TYPE: filter by event type (deletion, scan, pressure, error)
- Pretty-prints JSONL with timestamp, event type, and detail extraction

Add cross-user daemon detection fallback for render_status():
- When daemon runs as root (systemd) but CLI runs as ubuntu, the state
  file paths don't match. Fallback checks systemctl is-active sbh.service
  and /proc cmdline scanning.

Fix is_swap_thrash_risk() to suppress zram false positives (same logic
as daemon-side fix, applied to CLI status rendering path).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
